name: Ginger Beer No. 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a clean jar.
2. Stir until the sugar is fully dissolved.
3. Cover the jar and let it sit for two days.
4. On the third day, strain through a thin muslin cloth.
5. Bottle the strained liquid.
6. Serve with cracked ice.
N.B. If only a mild flavor is desired, reduce the amount of ginger.
